name: @kryptosai/mcp-seatbelt
description: Runtime guardrails for AI agent MCP tools. Detects MCP configs across 8 clients, blocks dangerous tool calls with a policy proxy, and enforces security at runtime.

tools.name: init
tools.description: Detect MCP configs, assess risk, and generate a policy file

tools.name: proxy
tools.description: Start a runtime policy proxy that intercepts and enforces MCP tool calls

tools.name: report
tools.description: Generate a risk report in Markdown or SARIF format

tools.name: check
tools.description: Quickly check detected MCP configurations for risks

tools.name: dashboard
tools.description: Start a live dashboard web UI for proxy monitoring

tools.name: diff
tools.description: Compare two policy files and show differences

tools.name: import-observatory
tools.description: Import mcp-observatory scan results as policy rules
